title: A Bread Factory, Part Two
original_title: A Bread Factory, Part Two: Walk With Me A While
overview: The Bread Factory is the scene for rehearsals of the Greek play Hecuba. But the real theatrics are outside the theater, with the town invaded by bizarre tourists and mysterious tech start-up workers. There is a new normal in Checkford, if it is even really Checkford any longer.
